description: Classic FFA inspired by N64 multi, pickups only, no classes.
notes: Score by kills; any player can trigger airlock; hazards are pure map control tools.

description: Two-team variant focusing on hub control and squad pushes.
notes: Teams of 4v4 or 8v8; triggering team gets announcer credit for hazard kills.

description: Asymmetrical mode with AI aliens pressuring both teams.
notes: Aliens may auto-trigger hazards when controlling hub; players can pre-empt with consoles.
Teams fight over Alien Egg/Canister; airlock best used to secure delivery routes.
